sprints.name: Self-Service & Growth
sprints.rationale: Remove admin bottleneck. Enable self-serve onboarding via OAuth (Webflow + Google), organic acquisition via Marketplace listing, and white-label resale for agencies.

items.title: Self-service Webflow connection onboarding
items.notes: OAuth Webflow App for zero-instruction client connection. Conditional OnboardingWizard step. Prerequisite for Marketplace listing (#119).

items.title: GSC/GA4 self-service OAuth connection
items.notes: Client connects Google Search Console and GA4 via OAuth consent screen. Phase 2 of self-service (Phase 1 = Webflow).

items.title: Admin onboarding / first-run experience
items.notes: 7-step checklist on empty command center: create workspace, link Webflow, connect GSC, connect GA4, run audit, set client password, configure email.

items.title: Webflow App Marketplace listing
items.notes: Register as official Webflow App → appear in Marketplace → one-click install. Zero-cost distribution channel. Depends on OAuth (#100).

items.title: White-label domain support
items.notes: CNAME + reverse proxy. Configurable branding (logo, colors, favicon, email sender, chatbot persona). Agency resale tiers ($299-999/mo). Moved from Sprint C — fits better with distribution/growth.

items.title: API documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger spec)
items.notes: 48 route files with no formal API docs beyond the code itself. If you bring on another developer or a client asks for API access, this becomes a blocker. Auto-generate OpenAPI spec from route definitions using tsoa or swagger-jsdoc. Host interactive docs at /api/docs. Document auth requirements, request/response schemas, and error codes for all public and admin endpoints.

sprints.name: Team & Collaboration
sprints.rationale: Multi-user support for growing agencies. Execute when team size or client demands justify it.

items.title: Internal team management
items.notes: Invite team members, manage roles, assign workspaces.

items.title: Permission-based feature access
items.notes: Fine-grained: client_member view-only on approvals, member can't delete workspaces.

items.title: Writer assignment
items.notes: Assign content briefs to specific writers with notifications.

items.title: Client team collaboration
items.notes: Comments on strategy items, @mentions on briefs, shared notes. Per-seat pricing opportunity.

items.title: Notification preferences
items.notes: Per-user email settings, digest frequency.

sprints.name: Content Planner Integration
sprints.rationale: Wire content planner data into every existing tool so the platform feels unified. New features are isolated — this sprint connects them.

items.title: Client Overview — content plan insights in InsightsDigest
items.notes: Shipped — InsightsDigest: 3 insight variants (review needed, progress %, complete). OverviewTab action banner includes content plan review items.

items.title: Workspace Home — content pipeline stat card + action items
items.notes: Shipped — 5th stat card with published/total %, action item for review cells. Data derived in workspace-home.ts.

items.title: Content Plan tab badge count
items.notes: Shipped — Blue badge on Content Plan tab showing review+flagged cell count.

items.title: Strategy tab — show planned coverage badges
items.notes: Shipped — Violet Planned/In Progress/Approved/Published badges on content gaps matching matrix cells.

items.title: ROI Dashboard — include matrix-planned content
items.notes: Shipped — Published matrix cells included in contentItems with violet 'Content Plan' badge. Deduped by keyword.

items.title: Strategy → Content Planner action bridge
items.notes: Shipped — Admin 'Add to Planner' button on content gaps → Content Pipeline. Client 'Planned' badges are clickable → Content Plan tab. Feature #164.

items.title: Site Architecture — show planned URLs from matrices
items.notes: Shipped — Purple 'Planned' badge, source priority enforcement, published cells excluded from planned. Feature #161.

items.title: Content Performance — track matrix-published content
items.notes: Shipped — Published matrix cells included in performance view, deduped by keyword, violet 'Content Plan' badge. Feature #162.

items.title: Client Overview → Content Plan quick action card
items.notes: Shipped — Implemented as part of #414 (action-needed banner + InsightsDigest cards).

items.title: Inbox — include content plan reviews
items.notes: Shipped — 'Content Plan' filter in Inbox showing review/flagged cells with flag action. Feature #163.

items.title: Notification bell — content plan review alerts
items.notes: Shipped — Workspace overview includes contentPlan.review count. NotificationBell shows violet alert for review/flagged cells. Feature #165.

items.title: Content Calendar — matrix cell entries
items.notes: Shipped — Matrix cells on calendar with violet 'Matrix Cell' type, filter pill, stat card. Dates from linked posts/briefs or matrix updatedAt. Feature #166.

items.title: Content Pipeline — health summary bar
items.notes: Shipped — Summary bar above tabs: briefs, posts, matrices, cells with publish %. Feature #167.

items.title: Matrix cell status timeline
items.notes: Shipped — StatusHistoryEntry type + auto-record in updateMatrixCell + vertical timeline in CellDetailPanel with relative timestamps. Feature #168.

items.title: Admin Chat — content plan context
items.notes: Include template/matrix counts and pipeline status in AI chat context for content-plan-aware answers.

items.title: Client Chat — content plan context
items.notes: Include content plan summary in client chat context for 'What's my content status?' queries.

items.title: Content Briefs — template cross-reference
items.notes: When generating a brief for a keyword matching a matrix cell, show callout and pre-fill from template sections.

items.title: Workspace Home — content velocity metric
items.notes: Track pages published per month as a trend. Leading indicator for ranking momentum.

items.title: LLMs.txt — include planned/approved content
items.notes: Include matrix cells with status >= approved as 'upcoming content' in LLMs.txt output.

items.title: Move Guide tab to floating help button
items.notes: Content Pipeline has 7 sub-tabs. Move Guide to a floating ? button to reduce tab clutter.

items.title: Command Palette — content planner quick actions
items.notes: Add 'Create Content Template', 'Build Content Matrix', 'View Content Plan' to CommandPalette.

sprints.name: UI/UX Audit Implementation
sprints.rationale: Complete implementation of all findings from comprehensive UI/UX audit: quick wins (empty states, command palette, mobile), backend capability exposure (churn, anomalies, ROI, cannibalization), and strategic improvements (widget system, AI insights, accessibility).

items.title: Empty State Standardization — Migrate 114 ad-hoc empty states to EmptyState primitive
items.notes: 114 ad-hoc empty state implementations across 50 files. Audit each, migrate to EmptyState component with context-appropriate icon/title/description/action. Create variants: NoData, NoSearchResults, NeedsConnection.

items.title: Command Palette Visibility — Add search trigger to header bar
items.notes: Command Palette exists but only accessible via ⌘K keyboard shortcut. Add magnifying glass icon button to header bar (next to notification bell) that opens Command Palette. Show ⌘K hint in tooltip.

items.title: MobileGuard Improvement — Allow read-only mobile access
items.notes: Currently blocks all mobile with 'Desktop only' message. Change to: allow read-only views (analytics, search, audit results) on mobile. Block only complex editing tools. Show 'Best on desktop' notice instead of hard block.

items.title: Unified Notification Hub — Merge NotificationBell + TaskPanel
items.notes: Current fragmentation: NotificationBell (top right), TaskPanel (processing queue), inline toasts, email queue. Create unified notification center with categories: Actions Needed (approvals, requests), System Events (audits complete), Alerts (score drops). Add notification preferences per workspace.

items.title: Churn Signals Exposure — Add 'At Risk' filter to workspace overview
items.notes: Backend has churn-signals.ts that detects client risk based on activity patterns. Not exposed in UI. Add 'At Risk' badge/filter to workspace cards in Command Center. Show churn risk factors (low activity, pending approvals aging, etc.).

items.title: Anomaly Detection Dashboard — Expose ML-based traffic/ranking anomalies
items.notes: Backend has anomaly-detection.ts with ML-based anomaly detection. Currently barely visible. Create 'Insights' tab or section showing detected anomalies with explanations: 'Your LCP improved 23% this week', 'Traffic drop detected on [page]', 'Ranking anomaly for [keyword]'.

items.title: ROI Dashboard in Admin — Show organic traffic value per workspace
items.notes: ROI calculation exists in client portal only. Add ROI metric cards to admin Workspace Home and Command Center workspace cards. Shows organic traffic value delivered to justify agency fees.

items.title: Cannibalization Detection UI — Surface keyword conflicts in Strategy tab
items.notes: Shipped — CannibalizationAlert component in Strategy tab with severity badges, per-page metrics, GSC/map source labels, and canonical recommender (action types: canonical_tag, redirect_301, differentiate, noindex). Feature #153.

items.title: Content Decay Prominence — Promote decaying content alert to main view
items.notes: ContentDecay exists as buried sub-tab. Add decay alert card to Content Pipeline main view. Show pages with declining traffic and 'Refresh' action button.

items.title: Approval Reminders UI — Add 'Send reminder' to approval batches
items.notes: Backend has approval-reminders.ts. Add 'Send reminder' button to pending approval batches. Show reminder history (last sent, count).

items.title: Scheduled Audits Config — UI for recurring audit settings
items.notes: Backend has scheduled-audits.ts. Add configuration UI to Site Audit tab: enable/disable, frequency (weekly/monthly), email alerts on score drops.

items.title: Widget System — Customizable Workspace Home dashboard
items.notes: Let users pin/unpin modules on Workspace Home, rearrange widget order, choose sizes (compact/full/wide). Save per-workspace layouts to localStorage or workspace config.

items.title: AI Insights Feed — TikTok-style vertical feed of actionable insights
items.notes: Swipeable insight cards: 'LCP improved 23%', '3 pages need schema', 'Competitor published 5 articles'. Auto-generated from anomaly detection + audit + strategy data.

items.title: Command Palette 2.0 — Action palette with natural language
items.notes: Expand from navigation to actions: 'Generate schema for [page]', 'Create brief for [keyword]', 'Run audit'. Natural language: 'Show thin content pages'.

items.title: Client Education Hub — Embedded SEO education throughout
items.notes: Contextual tooltips with 'Why this matters'. 'Learn more' links to SeoGlossary. Video explanations for complex features. Education tip cards in empty states.

items.title: Performance Budget Dashboard — Visual page weight tracker
items.notes: Show page weight over time per workspace. Alert on regressions. Recommendations: 'Homepage grew 400KB, consider image optimization'.

items.title: Accessibility Improvements — WCAG AA compliance pass
items.notes: Add ARIA landmarks, focus management for modals, keyboard navigation for complex widgets. Skip links. Test with screen reader (NVDA/VoiceOver).

items.title: Form Validation Standardization — React Hook Form + Zod
items.notes: Replace basic HTML validation with consistent form library. Inline field-level validation with clear errors. aria-invalid + aria-describedby support. Success states for valid fields.

items.title: Loading State Consistency — Unified skeleton system
items.notes: Standardize loading patterns: route-level (keep ChunkFallback), data fetching (skeleton screens), actions (button loading + optimistic UI), background jobs (progress panel).

sprints.name: Client Dashboard UI/UX Refresh
sprints.rationale: Address information overload in client portal. Progressive disclosure, unified visual hierarchy, and strategic prioritization to reduce cognitive load and improve actionability.

items.title: StrategyTab redesign — accordion sections, health score, reduced gradients
items.notes: Shipped — Added Strategy Health Score (0-100) at top with 3 sub-scores (Content Gaps 40%, Quick Wins 30%, Coverage 30%). Converted all sections to accordions with only Content Opportunities expanded by default. Removed competing gradient backgrounds — all sections now use consistent bg-zinc-900/border-zinc-800.

items.title: StrategyTab refinements — View all buttons, keyword visibility, helper text
items.notes: Shipped — Fixed 'View all' buttons to use expandedCounts state and actually expand lists. Added primary keyword display to Growth Opportunities cards. Added clarifying helper text under Keyword Opportunities ('Additional keywords your existing pages could target') and Competitor Gaps ('Keywords your competitors rank for that you don't'). Page Keyword Map now shows '+X more' indicator for secondary keywords.

items.title: StrategyTab v2 — Card-based command center
items.notes: Shipped — Complete redesign from accordion-based to card-based command center. 1) Top Summary Bar: 3 action cards (Content Gaps | Quick Wins | Growth Opportunities) with counts and CTAs that jump to sections. 2) Content Opportunities: Removed rationale truncation (show full text), show first 4 in 2-col grid with 'View all' toggle for even columns. 3) Growth Opportunities: Transformed from list to 3-up card grid with smart CTAs based on difficulty/impressions (Optimize to Rank/Build Authority/Expand Content/Quick Win). 4) Consolidated Reference Data: Quick Wins, Keyword Opportunities, Target Keywords, Competitor Gaps, Page Map now in single collapsed 'Reference Data' section. Reduced click fatigue, clearer actions, better scanability.

items.title: HealthTab redesign — Card-based command center
items.notes: Shipped v2 — Complete card-based redesign: 1) Health Score summary at top with 1-sentence status, 2) Page Speed card fully expanded (CWV mobile/desktop side-by-side), 3) Two-column layout: 'Fix These First' list (top 5 prioritized issues) | Page Cards (top 3 worst pages with click-to-expand), 4) Site-Wide Issues as compact conditional banner, 5) History & Details in single collapsed accordion. Removed FixRecommendations and OrderStatus from this tab. Removed all nested accordions. Clients can now scan→decide→act without clicking through sections.

items.title: HealthTab redesign — Card-based command center
items.notes: Shipped v2 — Complete card-based redesign: 1) Health Score summary at top with 1-sentence status, 2) Page Speed card fully expanded (CWV mobile/desktop side-by-side), 3) Two-column layout: 'Fix These First' list (top 5 prioritized issues) | Page Cards (top 3 worst pages with click-to-expand), 4) Site-Wide Issues as compact conditional banner, 5) History & Details in single collapsed accordion. Removed FixRecommendations and OrderStatus from this tab. Removed all nested accordions. Clients can now scan→decide→act without clicking through sections.

items.title: SearchTab redesign — insight-first, tables secondary
items.notes: Lead with 'What's working' insight cards (top movers, quick wins). Data tables move to collapsible 'Detailed Breakdown' section. Annotations become timeline view not separate tab. CTR opportunities prioritized above raw query lists. Default view shows 10 rows with 'Show more' not infinite scroll.

sprints.name: Backlog
sprints.rationale: Revisit quarterly. Prioritize when a specific client need, revenue opportunity, or scale threshold justifies it.

items.title: Content Templates backend (CRUD + migration 014)
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 1a: Reusable page structure templates with variables, sections, URL/keyword patterns. SQLite migration 014, CRUD, routes, API client, 10 integration tests.

items.title: Keyword Pre-Assignment & SEMRush Validation
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 1b: Brief generation accepts template constraints + pre-locked keywords. SEMRush validation endpoints (single + bulk). Migration 015 for keyword tracking columns.

items.title: Content Matrices backend (CRUD + migration 016)
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 2a: Bulk content planning grids with cartesian product cell generation. Per-cell status tracking, SQLite migration 016, routes, API client, 12 integration tests.

items.title: Smart Keyword Recommendations (SEMRush + AI scoring)
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 2b: Opportunity scoring (volume/difficulty), SEMRush related keywords, optional AI re-ranking via GPT-4.1-nano. Standalone + per-cell endpoints.

items.title: Cannibalization Detection
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 2c: Keyword overlap detection against existing pages, same-matrix cells, cross-matrix cells. Three severity levels. Full matrix report + single keyword check endpoints.

items.title: Content Planner Export (CSV/JSON)
items.notes: Shipped — Phase 3: Matrix cells flattened CSV/JSON export + template metadata export. Added to existing data-export routes.

items.title: Site Architecture Planner
items.notes: Shipped — URL tree from Webflow pages + CMS sitemap + matrix planned pages + keyword strategy. Gap detection for missing hub pages. Depth distribution + orphan analysis.

items.title: LLMs.txt Generator
items.notes: Shipped — Generates LLMs.txt from site pages, keyword strategy, and planned content. JSON preview + .txt download endpoint.

items.title: Site Architecture Planner UI
items.notes: Shipped — Interactive collapsible URL tree with source badges, search/filter, stat cards, gap list, orphan warnings, depth chart. Wired as Architecture sub-tab in Content Pipeline.

items.title: LLMs.txt Generator UI
items.notes: Shipped — One-click generate, copy, download .txt, stat cards, scrollable preview, info card. Wired as LLMs.txt sub-tab in Content Pipeline.

items.title: Content Pipeline Data Export Dropdown
items.notes: Shipped — Unified Export button in Content Pipeline tab bar. CSV/JSON for briefs, requests, matrices, templates, strategy.

items.title: Content Planner Admin Orchestrator
items.notes: Shipped — ContentPlanner.tsx orchestrates TemplateEditor, MatrixBuilder, MatrixGrid. Lazy-loaded Planner sub-tab in ContentPipeline. List view with template/matrix cards, progress bars, badges.

items.title: Client Content Plan Tab
items.notes: Shipped — ContentPlanTab in client portal (paid tiers). Fetches plans from public API, auto-selects single plan, shows MatrixProgressView with cell flagging + downloads.

items.title: Client Review Flow (Tiered Content Plan Review)
items.notes: Shipped — Tiered review: template approval via batch, sample cell review, batch-approve remaining. Public matrix progress view + cell flagging. 6 API endpoints (3 public + 3 admin).

items.title: Strategy & implementation hours system
items.notes: Premium includes 3 strategy & implementation hrs/mo. Defer until premium tier has more subscribers.

items.title: Webhook / Zapier triggers
items.notes: Fire webhooks on key events. Enables automation integrations.

items.title: Responsive mobile layout
items.notes: Sidebar → bottom nav, stacked cards on small screens.

items.title: Shared notes / wiki per workspace
items.notes: Team-internal notes about a client.

items.title: Client NPS survey
items.notes: Periodic in-dashboard satisfaction survey.

items.title: Schema auto-schedule
items.notes: Re-generate schemas on cadence, flag stale pages.

items.title: Historical redirect comparison
items.notes: Track redirect status over time, detect new 404s.

items.title: Full-site PageSpeed scan
items.notes: Multi-page PSI scan as background job.

items.title: Accessibility audit expansion
items.notes: WCAG contrast, ARIA, heading order, form labels.

items.title: WCAG AA full compliance
items.notes: Focus indicators, keyboard nav for all interactive elements.

items.title: Schema generator → gpt-4.1-mini upgrade
items.notes: Shipped — all AI models upgraded to GPT-4.1 series (Mar 2026). Schema uses gpt-4.1-mini.

items.title: GSC: URL Inspection API
items.notes: Per-URL indexing status, crawl info.

items.title: GA4: Exit pages + attribution
items.notes: Advanced analytics.

items.title: Webflow Enterprise API: 301 redirects
items.notes: Push rules via API (Enterprise-only).

items.title: Sales report: branded PDF export
items.notes: Shipped — sales-report-html.ts generates branded HTML export for prospects.

items.title: Sales report: email delivery
items.notes: Send reports directly to prospects.

items.title: Sales report: CRM integration
items.notes: Push prospect data to HubSpot/Pipedrive.

items.title: Predictive SEO & trend forecasting
items.notes: Historical GSC data + Google Trends API + seasonal patterns → predict growing keywords 30-90 days out.

items.title: Cross-client benchmarking network
items.notes: Anonymized benchmarks across all clients. Needs 20+ active clients.

items.title: Backlink intelligence & outreach
items.notes: Ahrefs/Moz API → backlink profile → link gaps → AI outreach templates. Elevated from P3 — backlinks are a top-3 ranking factor and this capability justifies premium pricing. Lightweight overview (#213) ships first in Sprint F; this is the full-featured follow-up.

items.title: Local SEO module
items.notes: GBP integration, local keyword tracking, citation monitoring. Add-on $99-149/mo.

items.title: AI strategy memory & learning
items.notes: AI learns from conversations, approved changes, rejected suggestions. Proprietary knowledge asset.

items.title: WordPress / Shopify support
items.notes: Abstract CMS integration layer. Only after Webflow PMF proven.

items.title: Embeddable SEO widgets
items.notes: Embeddable site health badge, traffic counter. Passive referral generation.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — Architecture → Schema Integration
sprints.rationale: Bridge site architecture tree with schema generation. Deterministic breadcrumbs, unified schema plan, coverage dashboard, priority queue, competitive intelligence, and full pipeline automation.

items.title: [C1] Deterministic BreadcrumbList from architecture tree
items.notes: Shipped — getAncestorChain() + flattenTree() + getCachedArchitecture() in site-architecture.ts. SchemaContext._architectureTree extension. Architecture loaded in routes (webflow-schema + jobs). injectCrossReferences() builds full breadcrumb chain from tree with URL-segment fallback. Feature #169.

items.title: [C2] Unify schema plan with architecture tree input
items.notes: Shipped — PlanContext.architectureResult + flattenTree()-based page list with pageType/depth enrichment. Route loads cached architecture. Falls back to direct API+sitemap when tree unavailable. Feature #170.

items.title: [D1] Page type → schema type mapping + prompt injection
items.notes: Shipped — PAGE_TYPE_SCHEMA_MAP constant mapping all 16 page types to primary/secondary Schema.org types. SCHEMA TYPE GUIDANCE block injected into AI prompt when pageType is set (not 'auto'). Exported for D2/D3 consumption. Feature #143.

items.title: [C3] Schema coverage dashboard in SiteArchitecture UI
items.notes: Shipped — GET /api/site-architecture/:wsId/schema-coverage endpoint, coverage stat card with %, per-node tree badges (checkmark/X), Missing Schema sidebar panel. Feature #172.

items.title: [D2] Template → schema template binding
items.notes: Shipped — schemaTypes on ContentTemplate auto-populated from PAGE_TYPE_SCHEMA_MAP, expectedSchemaTypes inherited by MatrixCell on generation, purple badges in CellDetailPanel. Feature #144.

items.title: [D3] Hub page → CollectionPage/ItemList auto-suggest
items.notes: Shipped — getChildNodes() helper + CollectionPage injection in injectCrossReferences() for pages with 2+ existing children. Feature #144.

items.title: [C4] Internal link health → schema priority queue
items.notes: Shipped — schema coverage endpoint enriched with PageLinkHealth data. Priority scoring: critical (orphan+no schema) → high (< 3 inbound) → medium → low (has schema, poor links). Frontend priority queue panel with badges + orphan tags. Feature #173.

items.title: [C5] SiteNavigationElement auto-gen for homepage
items.notes: Shipped — injectCrossReferences() auto-injects SiteNavigationElement for homepage from depth-1 tree children (existing + hasContent, capped at 10). Feature #171.

items.title: [D5] Sibling/parent-child relationship enrichment
items.notes: Shipped — getParentNode(), getSiblingNodes(), getChildNodes() helpers. isPartOf→parent page, relatedLink→siblings (max 5), hasPart→children injected into WebPage nodes. Feature #144.

items.title: [D4] Competitor schema intelligence
items.notes: Shipped — crawlCompetitorSchemas() + compareSchemas() with 24h file cache, rate-limited fetcher (2 concurrent, 500ms delay, 10s timeout). GET /api/competitor-schema/:workspaceId. Feature #147.

items.title: [C6] Schema impact tracking via GSC before/after
items.notes: Shipped — sourceFilter on getSeoChangeImpact(), getSchemaImpactSummary() with aggregate deltas, /api/schema-impact endpoint, collapsible impact panel in SchemaSuggester with per-deployment GSC before/after. Feature #174.

items.title: [D6] Brief E-E-A-T → author/publisher schema enrichment
items.notes: Shipped — extractEeatFromBrief() extracts author name, credentials, expertise topics from brief eeatGuidance. Injected into AI prompt + post-processing populates Person author on Article/BlogPosting. Feature #148.

items.title: [D7] Planned page schema pre-generation
items.notes: Shipped — generateSchemaSkeleton() builds deterministic JSON-LD from cell + template. pending_schemas SQLite table with pending/applied/stale lifecycle. Triggered async from updateMatrixCell() on brief_generated/approved. GET /api/pending-schemas/:workspaceId endpoint. Feature #149.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — SEO Intelligence & Revenue
sprints.rationale: Deeper competitive and technical SEO capabilities that differentiate the platform. Revenue dashboard for admin business visibility. Backlink and content gap analysis justify premium pricing.

items.title: Platform revenue dashboard in Command Center
items.notes: Shipped — RevenueDashboard component with total revenue, MoM growth, revenue by workspace, revenue by product type, recent transactions table. Accessible via /revenue route + Command Center header button + sidebar utility bar. Only shows webhook-confirmed paid transactions.

items.title: Competitive intelligence hub (in Strategy tab)
items.notes: Shipped — SEMRush domain overview, keyword gaps, backlinks, top keywords comparison for up to 3 competitors. CompetitiveIntel component in Strategy tab.

items.title: AI-powered internal linking engine
items.notes: Shipped — AI link suggestions + orphan page detection + per-page health scoring (0-100) + grouped view + copy-to-clipboard HTML links.

items.title: Bulk page operations in SEO Editor
items.notes: Shipped — multi-select toolbar, pattern append/prepend, concurrent AI rewrite with dry-run preview.

items.title: Lightweight backlink profile overview
items.notes: Shipped — BacklinkProfile component in Strategy tab via SEMRush backlinks_overview + backlinks_refdomains APIs. Shows total backlinks, referring domains, follow/nofollow ratio, link types, top 15 referring domains table. Cached 48h. Graceful fallback when SEMRush not configured.

items.title: GSC 404 import for redirect scanner
items.notes: Shipped — Already implemented via getAllGscPages() ghost URL cross-referencing in redirect scanner. GSC pages that don't exist on site are added with source:'gsc', shown with amber badges in UI, and get redirect recommendations.

items.title: Audit historical trend charts
items.notes: Shipped — ScoreTrendChart component in audit/ module, Recharts line charts for audit score over time.

items.title: Heavy dependency audit / tree-shaking
items.notes: Shipped — Lucide tree-shaking verified (individual icon code-splitting). Added manualChunks in vite.config.ts: react-vendor (React/ReactDOM/Router) + stripe (lazy). Lazy-loaded StripePaymentForm in ClientDashboard. Main bundle split 366→188 kB + 190 kB react-vendor. ClientDashboard 379→359 kB. Stripe 13 kB lazy chunk.

Sitemap-based link discovery + Live Domain UI + diagnostic messaging
items.notes: Shipped — sitemap.xml as primary page source, User-Agent headers for Cloudflare, double-protocol fix, attemptedPageCount diagnostics, Live Domain field in Workspace Settings

items.title: AI Page Rewriter — full-page split chat with rewriting playbook
items.notes: Shipped — Two-pane layout (chat + page content), GPT-4.1 with full workspace context, rewriting playbook in BrandHub, sidebar nav entry, conversation memory

items.title: Schema generator: enhanced validation, auto-fix, and improved prompting
items.notes: Shipped — Invalid property detection + auto-strip, cross-reference validation, phone format validation, keyword-stuffing detection, recommended field warnings, 6 new AI prompt rules

items.title: Brand name resolution fix (getBrandName helper)
items.notes: Shipped — Fixes Webflow internal site name injection in AI prompts. New getBrandName(ws) helper across 6 server files.

items.title: SEO Editor per-page Send to Client + label rename
items.notes: Shipped — Per-page Send to Client button in SEO Editor, bulk button renamed to Send to Client for consistency

items.title: Editable workspace name in Workspace Settings
items.notes: Shipped — Inline-editable workspace name with pencil icon, Enter/Escape support, PATCH /api/workspaces/:id

items.title: Schema Generator: page type selector + auto-load pages on mount
items.notes: Shipped — Pages auto-load on mount with page type dropdowns (13 types). Page type hint passed to AI prompt for tailored schema generation. Initial view replaced with full page list + type selectors + per-page generate buttons.

items.title: AEO Review: Send to Client per-page changes
items.notes: Add per-page Send to Client button to AEO Review change cards. Each recommended change (rewrite_intro, add_faq, add_section, etc.) should be sendable to the client approval queue with current→suggested diff as the approval payload.

items.title: Internal Links: Send to Client link suggestions
items.notes: Add Send to Client button per page in Internal Links results. Sends suggested link insertions (anchor text, target URL, context snippet) to client approval queue so client can approve before agency implements.

items.title: Keyword Strategy: Send to Client strategy recommendations
items.notes: Add bulk Send to Client for keyword strategy tabs (Quick Wins, Content Gaps, Low Hanging Fruit). Packages selected recommendations into approval batch for client review before implementation.

items.title: Redirect Manager: Send to Client redirect proposals
items.notes: Add Send to Client for proposed redirects (broken links, chain fixes). Client reviews source→target mappings before agency publishes them to Webflow.

items.title: Content Decay: Send to Client refresh recommendations
items.notes: Add Send to Client for decaying content pages. Sends page title, traffic decline data, and recommended action (refresh, merge, redirect) to client for awareness/approval.

items.title: Schema Post-Processing Pipeline: Content Verification + AI Auto-Fix Loop
items.notes: Shipped — 7-step postProcessSchema pipeline: autoFix → content verification (strips hallucinated emails/phones/addresses/hours/geo/sameAs) → cross-reference injection → clean → validate → AI auto-fix loop → final output. Also hardened extractStructuredInfo to use visible text only, added anti-fragmentation prompt rules for SaaS sites.

items.title: Unified Site Template: Consistent Organization/WebSite across all pages
items.notes: Shipped — Two-phase schema generation per Google best practices. Homepage saves full Organization + WebSite as site template (SQLite migration 012). Subpages load template and use minimal stubs (@id, name, url only). Missing Org/WebSite/BreadcrumbList nodes auto-injected. Prompt requirements 3-4 updated for homepage/subpage split.

items.title: Schema: Save as Site Template UI + auto-save on homepage publish
items.notes: Shipped — 'Save as Site Template' button on SchemaPageCard for homepage. PUT /api/schema-template/:siteId endpoint. Auto-saves Org + WebSite on homepage publish. getOrSeedSiteTemplate auto-seeds from existing snapshot if no template saved.

items.title: Schema: Logo propagation + edit persistence + FAQ content verification
items.notes: Shipped — Logo carried from template to subpage Organization stubs. updatePageSchemaInSnapshot persists edited schema to SQLite on publish. FAQ content verification strips FAQPage when questions not in page text.

items.title: Schema: Structural FAQ detection + breadcrumb auto-trim + Service url injection
items.notes: Shipped — FAQ verification requires structural evidence (FAQ heading, accordion markup, FAQ CSS classes). Breadcrumb names auto-trimmed (strip brand suffixes, cap ~50 chars). Service/SoftwareApplication url auto-injected from WebPage. SoftwareApplication added to CROSS_REF_RULES and REQUIRED_FIELDS.

items.title: Schema: Organization dedup + Service @id normalization + 37 prompt rules
items.notes: Shipped — Auto-dedup Organization nodes (removes /#organization-stub duplicates). Auto-normalize Service @id to match canonical url field. 37 AI prompt rules: lead-gen page detection (skip Service on /demo, /contact), consistent @id across pages for same product, description length guidance, WebPage desc mirrors meta desc.

items.title: Schema: Site-aware schema plan with page roles, entity registry, and client approval
items.notes: Shipped — AI-driven site-wide schema plan analyzes all pages + keyword strategy to assign page roles (homepage, pillar, audience, lead-gen, blog, etc.) and identify canonical entities with consistent @id references. Plan stored in SQLite (migration 013), injected as context into per-page AI prompts, enforced by post-processing validation. Admin SchemaPlanPanel with role dropdowns and entity registry. Send to Client creates approval batch with plain-English descriptions. 5 API endpoints: generate, get, update, send-to-client, activate.

items.title: Schema: CMS page discovery + unified page type vocabulary + Page Type Guide
items.notes: Shipped — Plan now discovers CMS collection pages from sitemap (up to 500). Unified 16 page types across plan + generator (added service, partnership, comparison, generic; renamed audience). Wildcard expansion for CMS collections. Page Type Guide index with descriptions + URL examples in both SchemaPlanPanel and SchemaSuggester.

items.title: Schema: Write generated schema to CMS collection field
items.notes: Allow writing generated schema JSON to a designated CMS collection field (e.g. 'schema-markup' rich text or plain text field) via Webflow CMS API. Would enable CMS-driven schema injection without Webflow custom code embeds. Also consider: cap CMS pages in bulk gen, add overall timeout/token budget, skip CMS pages matching existing CMS template.

items.title: Send to Client for standalone content briefs
items.notes: Shipped — Send to Client button on standalone briefs creates linked content request with client_review status and sends email notification.

items.title: Professional branded blog post PDF export
items.notes: Shipped — Branded print-ready HTML export for blog posts with HMPSN Studio branding, metrics strip, SEO preview, TOC, review checklist, and @page rules. Export PDF button in PostEditor toolbar.

items.title: AI auto-review checklist for blog posts
items.notes: Shipped — AI Pre-Check button in review checklist runs GPT-4.1-mini against post content to evaluate all 6 checklist items. Auto-checks passing items, shows pass/fail badges with AI reasoning.

items.title: CWV field-data vs Lighthouse lab score — dedicated summary card
items.notes: Shipped — CWV data moved out of siteWideIssues into dedicated cwvSummary on audit response. Frontend renders as a prominent card with mobile + desktop columns, per-metric ratings (LCP/INP/CLS), pass/fail badges, and Lighthouse lab score as secondary. Only Lighthouse lab score remains in siteWideIssues as info. Updated CSV/HTML report exports and client portal types.

items.title: Fix AI + SEMRush usage data loss on restart — disk-based queries
items.notes: Shipped — Both openai-helpers.ts and semrush.ts had a MAX_MEMORY_LOG=1000 cap that truncated usage data on startup. Query functions (getTokenUsage, getUsageByDay, getUsageByFeature, getSemrushUsage, getSemrushByDay, getTimeSaved) only read from the truncated in-memory array, so data appeared to vanish after restarts even though disk files were intact. Fix: removed in-memory array entirely, all query functions now read directly from disk JSON files via loadEntriesFromDisk()/loadCreditsFromDisk(). Write buffer (pendingWrites) kept for debounced disk writes only.

items.title: Platform-wide CWV integration — chatbot, monthly reports, InsightsDigest, HealthTab
items.notes: Shipped — CWV data now surfaces across 10 platform surfaces: (1) Client HealthTab card with mobile/desktop pass/fail and plain-language metrics, (2) Client AI chatbot context — cwvSummary added to siteHealthDetail so chatbot answers speed questions, server prompt updated with CWV data inventory line, (3) Monthly report emails — new Page Speed section with Mobile/Desktop speed badges and Lighthouse scores between score ring and traffic stats, (4) InsightsDigest — proactive 'Page speed: Passed/Needs Work' insight card on client Overview tab. Also: admin SeoAudit card, admin AI chat, audit report exports (CSV+HTML), AI recommendations engine, applySuppressionsToAudit pass-through fix.

items.title: Approval batch retract — pull back sent approvals from client view
items.notes: Shipped — New PendingApprovals component shows all pending/partial approval batches with Retract button. Inline confirmation dialog prevents accidental deletes. Expandable item details show per-item approval status. Wired into SeoEditor (nameFilter='SEO'), SchemaSuggester (nameFilter='Schema'), CmsEditor (nameFilter='CMS'). Each tool auto-refreshes the panel after sending new batches. API client method approvals.remove() calls existing DELETE /api/approvals/:workspaceId/:batchId endpoint that had no frontend wiring before. Also added approvals.list() admin endpoint wrapper.

items.title: Audit cleanup: CASCADE migration, stale API modules, recommendation specificity, noindex filtering
items.notes: Shipped — (1) Migration 019: ON DELETE CASCADE for 20+ workspace_id FKs that previously orphaned rows on workspace delete. (2) Fixed stale API module paths: recommendations, keywords.analyze, seoChangeTracker.impact, competitor endpoints now match actual backend routes. (3) Site-wide recommendations (duplicate titles, orphan pages) now list specific affected pages with traffic data instead of 'affects all pages'. affectedPages field added to SeoIssue type. (4) 'Pages needing attention' on HealthTab now filters out noindex pages since their issues don't affect search performance.

items.title: Content gap enrichment: SEMRush volume/KD + GSC impressions on content opportunities
items.notes: Shipped — ContentGap type extended with volume, difficulty, impressions fields. Strategy generation enriches content gaps from SEMRush domain data + bulk getKeywordOverview fallback for volume/KD, and GSC query data for existing site impressions (exact + partial keyword match). UI shows KD (color-coded green/amber/red), volume (searches/mo), and existing impressions on content opportunity cards in both admin ContentGaps.tsx and client StrategyTab.tsx. Public content endpoint passes through new fields. Existing strategies will show metrics after next regeneration.

items.title: AI Keyword Assignment Engine + Competitor-Enriched Strategy
items.notes: Shipped — Overhauled keyword strategy from AI keyword inventor to keyword assigner. Pool built from 5 sources (SEMRush domain, GSC, competitor keywords, keyword gaps, related keywords). AI batch prompt enforces pool assignment. Pre-enrichment skips redundant SEMRush lookups. Lookups capped at 30. Auto-discovery of organic competitors via SEMRush domain_organic_organic. Competitor keywords fetched in quick+full modes. Master prompt requires competitorProof on content gaps. Auto-discover UI button in strategy settings. Saved competitors persist between runs. Orange competitor proof badges in admin + client content gap cards.

items.title: SEMRush Question Keywords + Trend Direction + SERP Feature Targeting
items.notes: Shipped — Three new enrichments: (1) Question keywords via phrase_questions API in full mode, injected into AI context and attached to content gaps. (2) Trend direction computed from 12-month Td field (rising/declining/stable ±15%). (3) SERP features parsed from Fk field, 18 feature types mapped. Content gap cards badged with trend arrows, Featured Snippet/PAA badges in admin and client views.

items.title: Topical Authority Clustering
items.notes: Shipped — v2: AI-powered clustering via callStrategyAI (replaced mechanical 2-word phrase approach). Business context + knowledge base injected so clusters align with actual service areas and content pillars. 5-10 clusters, min 3 keywords each. Coverage bars, avg position, competitor alerts, gap pills.

items.title: Keyword Cannibalization Detection
items.notes: Shipped — v2: Canonical Recommender added. Cross-references keyword map + GSC data. Severity scoring. Now recommends specific action per conflict: canonical_tag, redirect_301, differentiate, or noindex based on page metrics. Includes canonical URL and action-specific guidance. UI shows action type badges with icons.

items.title: Competitor Content Monitoring (Scheduled Job)
items.notes: Future — Scheduled job to periodically fetch new competitor keywords and alert when competitors gain new rankings.

items.title: Authority-Adjusted Difficulty Filtering
items.notes: Future — Contextualize keyword difficulty (KD) by site's domain authority/rating. A KD of 40% means different things for a DR-20 site vs a DR-60 site.

items.title: URL-Level Keyword Intelligence (url_organic API)
items.notes: Future — Use SEMRush url_organic API to get per-page keyword data instead of domain-level. More precise keyword assignments for individual pages.

items.title: Client keyword feedback system (approve/decline)
items.notes: Shipped — Clients approve/decline keywords from Strategy tab. Declined keywords stored in AI memory bank, excluded from future strategy generations. Approve/decline on content gaps + page keyword map. Decline modal with optional reason. Declined Keywords summary section with restore. Migration 020.

items.title: Filter legal pages, 404s, utility pages from strategy
items.notes: Shipped — Expanded SKIP_PATHS, SKIP_PREFIXES, SKIP_PATTERNS in keyword-strategy.ts to exclude /privacy, /terms, /legal, /cookie-policy, /login, /signup, /maintenance, /coming-soon and more.

items.title: Client business priorities input
items.notes: Shipped — Clients add categorized business goals (growth/brand/product/audience/competitive) from Strategy tab. Stored in SQLite, injected into workspace businessContext for AI prompt. Migration 021.

items.title: Content gap voting (upvote/downvote)
items.notes: Shipped — Upvote/downvote arrows on content gap cards. Votes stored per-workspace per-keyword in SQLite. Signals topic priority to agency. Migration 021.

items.title: CMS SEO Editor issue highlighting (match static editor)
items.notes: Shipped — Color-coded left borders (amber for issues, status-based for tracking). 'No title'/'No desc' badges on collapsed rows. Collection-level issue counts. Character count color coding on Name field. Unsaved badge. Matches PageEditRow pattern from static editor.

items.title: SEMRush domain www. fix + credit-exhausted circuit breaker
items.notes: Shipped — cleanDomainForSemrush() strips www. prefix from all 6 domain-based functions. Circuit breaker pauses calls for 5min when credits exhausted. Diagnostic + cache-clear endpoints added.

items.title: Schema retract (plan + individual pages)
items.notes: Shipped — Retract published JSON-LD schemas from individual pages via Webflow Custom Code API. Delete entire schema site plans from SQLite. Confirmation-gated UI in SchemaPlanPanel + SchemaPageCard. Activity log + page state tracking. DELETE /api/webflow/schema-plan/:siteId and DELETE /api/webflow/schema-retract/:siteId/:pageId.

items.title: Client Schema Review Tab
items.notes: Shipped — New 'Schema' tab in client portal showing the schema plan in a client-friendly grouped-by-role view. Replaces 250+ individual approval notifications. Clients approve or request changes at the strategy level. Public endpoints for plan, snapshot, and feedback. SchemaReviewTab.tsx + 3 public API endpoints.

items.title: Type Safety & Lint Cleanup
items.notes: Shipped — Fixed all ESLint errors in ClientDashboard.tsx (10 errors → 0). Replaced ~25 unknown[] types across useClientData.ts, analytics.ts, content.ts, seo.ts with proper typed interfaces. Added 8 new shared type exports. Fixed setPricingData/setAuthMode/setClientUser type mismatches, Date.now() purity violation, Toast type incompatibility.
